content_fingerprint: deepinfra adds glm 5 1 to its cloud inference roster expanding access to zhipu ai s agentic model family deepinfra has made glm 5 1 zhipu ai s flagship agentic engineering model available on its managed inference infrastructure giving builders a usage based way to tap the model without self hosting deepinfra s pricing and model catalog page now lists glm 5 1 as available positioning it as a state of the art agentic engineering model the addition broadens deepinfra s coverage of frontier models from chinese ai labs alongside existing families such as claude deepseek llama mistral and qwen deepi
